title: The Nuvguard Expierence
description:
An unofficial modpack made for mc.nuvguard.com
Adds optimizations and visual improvements
body:
**UNOFFICIAL MODPACK, NOT MADE BY THE NUVGUARD TEAM.**  
**KEEP IN MIND THAT THE NUVGUARD TEAM RECOMMEND TO PLAY VANILLA, SO TRY THE MODPACK FOR YOURSELF *ONLY IF YOU WANT*.**  ![No you dont necessarily need mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4676dd58eefdd1c655099afd6168486fbd1cb87.png)
# **The Nuvguard Expierence**

**Modpack is made for mc.nuvguard.com**

This modpack adds stuff to make the player's expierence better by adding optimization mods, QoL mods and visual improvements to some stuff

This modpack contains Minecraft optimization mods like: 
- Sodium (with extra and reeses sodium options)
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Krypton
- ThreadTweak
- BadOptimizations

These mods can make the expierence better by: less lag, less fps drops and fps at a higher number.

The modpack also adds cool stuff like
- Better Clouds 
- Better Footstep Sounds (Presence Footsteps)
- Animated Characters (idle/walking/running/jumping) (Detailed Animations + Fresh Animations)
- PlayerHeads In Chat (Chathead)
- Different Crosshair
- 3D Skin Layers 
- Better Explosions (Explosive Enhancement)
- Water Waves (wakes) (not in the 1.21.5 version)
 

which makes the server look good without (almost) any performance loss. Although since the server isn't fully done, the modpack might fully change in the future.

I've also made changes to the GUI, splash text, panorama and the menu title to fit the Nuvguard theme.

Feel free to hit me up on discord if you have any questions or something else. ("Zepsterino" is my username)
